features: 3 SIZE VARIANTS – Includes 225ml, 500ml & 700ml bottles for every occasion—home, gym, or travel. Enjoy consistent freshness and value across sizes with this versatile bundle, ideal for solo use or sharing.

INVIGORATING FRAGRANCE – Infused with a zesty citrus and mint blend, Lynx Epic Fresh awakens your senses and boosts confidence. The cool, herbal tones keep you feeling revitalised and fresh all day long.

DEEP CLEAN FORMULA – Rich, foaming gel lifts dirt, sweat, and impurities without drying your skin. Leaves skin clean, smooth, and lightly fragranced with no tightness—perfect for daily use on all skin types.
DERMATOLOGICALLY TESTED – Skin-friendly body wash crafted for everyday use. Designed to cleanse gently while delivering a bold scent and smooth texture that works well for all ages and skin types.

VALUE 3PK BUNDLE – This multipack gives you long-lasting freshness and savings in one. Keep one at home, one in your gym bag, and one on hand for travel—so you’re always ready to feel fresh and clean.
description: Product description " Lynx Epic Fresh Shower Gel 3pk Bundle 225ml, 500ml & 700ml for All-Day Freshness Lynx Epic Fresh Shower Gel Awaken your senses and start your day feeling truly energised with Lynx Epic Fresh Shower Gel – a refreshing body wash crafted for men who want to look, feel, and smell their best from the moment they step out of the shower. Whether you're heading to work, the gym, or a night out, Epic Fresh is your go-to fragrance for all-day confidence and cleanliness. Infused with a crisp blend of zesty citrus and cool mint, Lynx Epic Fresh delivers an invigorating burst of freshness that kicks in from the first drop. The rich, foaming gel formula lathers quickly and spreads easily, helping to lift away dirt, sweat, and impurities from your skin without stripping away moisture. The result? A thorough cleanse that leaves your skin feeling clean, soft, and lightly fragranced – not dry or tight. Key Features: Extra-large 700ml size for long-lasting use Crisp, fresh scent for all-day confidence Creates a rich lather and rinses easily Dermatologically tested and skin-friendly Ideal for family use or bulk buyers Technical Specifications: Form: Shower gel liquid Size: 225, 500ml, 700ml Fragrance Notes: Citrus, mint, and cool herbal tones Bottle Type: Tall squeeze bottle with flip-top lid Box Contains: 1x Lynx Epic Fresh Shower Gel 225ml 1x Lynx Epic Fresh Shower Gel 500ml 1x Lynx Epic Fresh Shower Gel 700ml " Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Keep away from naked flame or direct heat sources

specifications_table.Special Features: Deep Clean Foaming Gel & Invigorating Fragrance
